stdout:
TokenPak — LLM Proxy with Context Compression
Tier: OSS (Community Edition)

All Commands:

  Control:
    start            Start the proxy (localhost:8766)
    stop             Stop the running proxy
    restart          Restart the proxy
    claude           Launch Claude Code with tokenpak companion active
    status           Check proxy health and connection status
    logs             Show recent proxy logs
    demo             See compression in action on sample data
    version          Show current versions (proxy, config, cli)
    update           Update TokenPak to the latest version
    license          Show license and edition info
    activate         Activate a Pro/Team/Enterprise license key
    deactivate       Remove license and revert to OSS
    plan             Show current tier, expiry, seats, and features
    validate         Validate a TokenPak JSON config file

  Visibility:
    cost             View your API spend and token usage
    doctor           Run diagnostics and health checks
    stats            Show registry stats

  Indexing:
    index            Index a directory for context retrieval
    search           Search indexed content

  Configuration:
    config           Config sync, pull, and validate (version control)

  ↑ Upgrade to PRO to unlock adaptive compression, smart routing, and real-time dashboards.

Run `tokenpak help <command>` for details.
